title: The Curly Hats Become Heroes
description: On pages 10–15, this part focuses on the curly hats become heroes within the The Poison Gas Called Koro storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: come to think of it, the gas really has disap- peared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The person you seek is not here! This country is hundreds of years old!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How much of it must you pillage and plunder to satisfy your black hearts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fuuv

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wanda-San! Those people saved me!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack and his sub- ordinates have all retreated from this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Tristan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wanda... these people...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Are not affiliated with Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And the reason the poisonous gas has dis- appeared from the city...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Is because of their magic!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Ah! Pedro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What are you all doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Over 24 hours have passed since the release of this gas!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: If antibodies to the Poisons of this gas are not administered within 48 hours of exposure, its effects become impossible to treat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can't afford to waste a single second if we hope to save everyone in this country!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Where is your hospital? I don't have enough tools or medicine to tend to all these people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I need you to round up everyone capable of assisting me!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm a doctor! Please, do as I say!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: tooto All

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you really... going to save us...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I thought we were done for... All of us... Dead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're not going to abandon a single one of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Though we were little more than strangers to you all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You really managed to save every last one of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We will never forget this debt as long as we live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: One day, we hope to be able to repay it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now, now, that really isn't necessary!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: WAAGGHHH! You guys...are like MINKATARIANS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Makes me proud to be a friggin' straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So that's how things went down ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see now why we were welcomed so warmly...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Seriously though, this jack guy grinds my gears!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Man, I promise you, one day I'll sock him and that Kaidou good and hard!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: But wasn't Jack's obituary...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have a hard time believing that that was actually true. You would too, if you'd seen the guy fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Are you guys going to stay and talk here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hm? Do you have someplace you need to be, chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, it's night now, so I thought I'd pay the ruler of the night, nekomamushi, a visit...

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: And the guardians of whale Forest. It's time for a checkup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Then let's get out the crocoys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: come to think of it, Wanda...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Isn't it time for you to sleep as well?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "I am a "ruer's bird." My job is to, day and night...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Be at the side of both rulers. I'm also one of the few people that can come and go as they please from both rulers' kingdoms.

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: I've got to report that Duke Inuarashi is safe and sound.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: though I suspect it'll be dismissed as "unneeded information," heh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nekomamushi! I wanna meet him too!

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Master Nekomamushi!! I too am quite fond of him! I shall accompany you!

summary: The Curly Hats Become Heroes: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
